name: Accordion
description: An accessible, placeholder-driven accordion. Authors add any number of AccordionItem components into its placeholder; each item supplies a title and its own content placeholder. Panels start collapsed; the AllowMultiple rendering parameter lets several panels stay open at once. Full keyboard support (arrow keys, Home/End) and reveals all panels in the Sitecore editor.

params.name: AllowMultiple
params.description: Allow multiple panels to be open at once (default: one at a time).
